prompt: Create a package for the cloud-services product targeting the grosse-energieversorger-de market in the T-Systems project at the project path provided. There are 4 solutions available (cloud-migration, hybrid-cloud, managed-hyperscaler, sovereign-cloud). Design tiered packages that a large German energy utility procurement team would evaluate.

assertions.text: Required fields present: slug, product_slug, market_slug, package_type, name, tiers
Each tier has: tier (kebab-case), name, included_solutions, scope, currency
Every included_solution references existing solution file
No orphan solutions (every solution in at least one tier)
